_doc: Additional evidence recognizers for evidence_audit hook. Copy to <project>/.agent-toolkit/evidence_audit_config.json and customize. Each pattern declares a regex over tool_result text; when matched in the current turn, the probe whose required_tools includes the pattern's `counts_as` value is considered satisfied even without an MCP tool call matching by name. Public toolkit ships only generic patterns; PR more upstream.

additional_evidence_patterns.name: falsify-cli-proven
additional_evidence_patterns.rationale: templates/codex/tools/falsify.py prints '[falsify] PROVEN:' on a successful timing_perturb / side_effect_inject / log_assertion / playwright run. Treat that as real-data evidence for the matching probe.

additional_evidence_patterns.name: playwright-python-stdout-block
additional_evidence_patterns.rationale: Playwright Python scripts conventionally emit a JSON evidence block flanked by ===PROBE_<id>_BEGIN===/===END===. When the block contains all_pass=true, accept it as browser-driven evidence in place of the manual-browser tool.

additional_evidence_patterns.name: mcp-realdata-module-test-ok
additional_evidence_patterns.rationale: mcp__realdata_test__run_module_test prints unittest's 'Ran N tests in T s ... OK' on success. Recognize that as real-data evidence.

additional_evidence_patterns.name: pytest-xdist-passed
additional_evidence_patterns.rationale: pytest output '<N> passed in <T>s'. Common across Django/Rails/generic Python stacks.
